TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Bsngan, title = Bsngan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bsngan} }

S.FORM: alang Bsngan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 532 buwan, 1,669 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 1,566 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 103 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 81%, Amis 3%, Tayan 3%, Bunun 1%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Bsngan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Bsngan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Bsngan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Bsngan hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Bsngan hya' ga Kulu. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Bsngan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 532 buwan, 1,669 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 1,566 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 103 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 81%, Amis 3%, Tayan 3%, Bunun 1%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Bsngan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Bsngan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Bsngan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Bsngan hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Bsngan hya' ga Kulu. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βs~ɕŋan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, βunun *%, s~ɕetik *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βs~ɕŋan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na βs~ɕŋan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na βs~ɕŋan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na βs~ɕŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na βs~ɕŋan ħjaʔ ɣa kulu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
